mapper.sql:
where 1 = 1
and (p.`ID` = #{request.orderCode} or p.`ORDERID` = #{request.orderCode})
and p.`XM` like concat('%', #{request.patientName}, '%')
and p.`SFZH` like concat('%', #{request.idCard}, '%')
and p.`LXDH` like concat('%', #{request.mobile}, '%')
and ( p.`ID` like concat('%', #{request.patientNo}, '%') or ifnull(p.`VIPID`, '') like concat('%', #{request.patientNo}, '%') or ifnull(p.`Medical_No`, '') like concat('%', #{request.patientNo}, '%') or ifnull(p.`Hosptial_No`, '') like concat('%', #{request.patientNo}, '%') or ifnull(p.`Clinic_No`, '') like concat('%', #{request.patientNo}, '%') )
and coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) >= #{request.startTime}
and coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) <= #{request.endTime}

convert(cast(p.`ID` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as studyId, convert(cast(p.`ORDERID` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as orderCode, convert(cast(p.`XM` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientName, convert(cast(p.`XB` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as gender, convert(cast(p.`SFZH` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as idCard, convert(cast(p.`LXDH` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as mobile, convert(cast(coalesce(nullif(p.`VIPID`, ''), nullif(p.`Medical_No`, ''), nullif(p.`Hosptial_No`, ''), nullif(p.`Clinic_No`, ''), p.`ID`) as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientNo, convert(cast(p.`ZHXMDM` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as packageCode, convert(cast(x.`XMMC` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as packageName, convert(cast(coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as examTime, convert(cast(l.`JCJG` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as abnormalSummary, convert(cast(l.`ZJJL` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as finalConclusion
mapper.select:
select KSBM as departmentCode, KSMC as departmentName from ods_tj_ksbm where KSBM is not null and KSBM != ''
and KSBM in
#{code}
order by OrderCode asc, KSBM asc
select COLUMN_NAME from information_schema.COLUMNS where TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} order by ORDINAL_POSITION asc

select convert(cast(p.`ID` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as studyId, convert(cast(p.`XM` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientName, convert(cast(p.`XB` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as gender, convert(cast(p.`SFZH` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as idCard, convert(cast(p.`LXDH` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as mobile, convert(cast(coalesce(nullif(p.`VIPID`, ''), nullif(p.`Medical_No`, ''), nullif(p.`Hosptial_No`, ''), nullif(p.`Clinic_No`, ''), p.`ID`) as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientNo from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID`
order by coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) desc, p.`ID` desc limit 1
select count(1) from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID`

select
from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID` left join ods_tj_xmzh x on x.`XMDM` = p.`ZHXMDM` where p.`ID` = #{studyId} limit 1

select
from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID` left join ods_tj_xmzh x on x.`XMDM` = p.`ZHXMDM` where p.`ID` in
#{studyId}
order by coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) desc, p.`ID` desc

select
from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID` left join ods_tj_xmzh x on x.`XMDM` = p.`ZHXMDM` where p.`SFZH` = #{idCard} and coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) >= #{startTime} order by coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) desc, p.`ID` desc

select * from (
select convert(cast(t.`StudyID` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as studyId, cast(#{table.departmentCode} as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as departmentCode, cast(#{table.departmentName} as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as departmentName, cast(#{table.tableName} as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as sourceTable,
convert(cast(
${table.majorItemCodeExpr} s.`SFXMDM`
as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as majorItemCode,
convert(cast(s.`SFXMMC` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as majorItemName,
convert(cast(${table.itemCodeExpr} as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
as itemCode,
convert(cast(
${table.itemNameExpr} j.`XXMC`
as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as itemName,
convert(cast(
${table.itemNameEnExpr} j.`EXXMC`
as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as itemNameEn,
convert(cast(${table.resultValueExpr} as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
as resultValue,
convert(cast(
${table.unitExpr} j.`Unit`
as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as unit,
convert(cast(
${table.referenceRangeExpr} concat_ws(' ~ ', j.`MDefValueDown`, j.`MDefValueUp`)
as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as referenceRange,
convert(cast(${table.abnormalFlagExpr} as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
as abnormalFlag,
convert(cast(${table.examTimeExpr} as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
as examTime,
cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as orderCode, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientName, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as gender, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as idCard, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as mobile, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientNo, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as packageCode, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as packageName, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as abnormalSummary, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as finalConclusion from ${table.tableName} t
left join ods_tj_jcmxx j on j.`XXDM` = ${table.itemCodeExpr}
left join ods_tj_jcmxx j on 1 = 0
left join ods_tj_sfxm s on s.`SFXMDM` = ${table.majorItemCodeExpr}
left join ods_tj_sfxm s on 1 = 0
where t.`StudyID` in
#{studyId}
) department_item_list order by studyId desc, departmentCode asc, majorItemCode asc, itemCode asc
